revision.comment: rmv inapt parent cat
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:tab went inactive so I need to add another category]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:Https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
fixing pages in [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Removing from [[Category:Tab went inactive so I need to add another category]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 15:41:59
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8205518)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Commons category}}
{{Cat main|20th-century classical music}}
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q8205518}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:20th-century classical music]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:20th century in music|Classical music]]
[[Category:20th-century music genres|Classical music]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Classical music by century]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22542364787|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Commons category}}
{{Cat main|20th-century classical music}}
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q8205518}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:20th-century classical music]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:20th century in music|Classical music]]
[[Category:20th-century music genres|Classical music]]
[[Category:Classical music by century]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=20th-century_classical_music here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=20th-century_classical_music for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<!--templates-->
{{Commons category}}
{{Cat main|20th-century classical music}}
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q8205518}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:20th-century classical music]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:20th century in music|Classical music]]
[[Category:20th-century music genres|Classical music]]
[[Category:Classical music by century]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25113759987|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

{{Navseasoncats}}
